creator: 0mp@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 193280
Patch adding a pkg-message with a link to a setup tutorial to security/kbfs

I've written a setup tutorial for KBFS today. It has some troubleshooting hints as well.[1]

I think that it would be great if our users are pointed to this wiki page after KBFS installation.

[1]: https://wiki.freebsd.org/Ports/security/kbfs
